scripts.build:packages: pnpm --filter @radflow/shared run build && pnpm --filter @radflow/messaging run build && pnpm --filter @radflow/ddd run build && pnpm --filter @radflow/telemetry run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run build:packages && pnpm -r run typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm run build:packages && pnpm -r run test
